title: Potential interacting genes with the C-terminal domain of human BRAP screened by an exhaustive yeast two-hybrid method
author: xiangping qu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Potential interacting genes with the C-terminal domain of human BRAP screened by an exhaustive yeast two-hybrid method. The protocol of the yeast two-hybrid was described in the text. About 6000 colonies were obtained that may contain the potential binding partners for CTD fragment of BRAP protein. The cCDN fragments contained in about 4500 colonies were sequenced by May 28, 2022.
steps_raw: Potential interacting genes with the C-terminal domain of human BRAP screened by an exhaustive yeast two-hybrid method. The protocol of the yeast two-hybrid was described in the text. About 6000 colonies were obtained that may contain the potential binding partners for CTD fragment of BRAP protein. The cCDN fragments contained in about 4500 colonies were sequenced by May 28, 2022.
